name: orq-claude-plugin
description: Orq plugins for Claude Code — tracing and MCP tools

plugins.name: orq-trace
plugins.description: Automatically trace Claude Code sessions to Orq. Captures sessions, turns, tool calls, and LLM responses as hierarchical OTLP spans.

plugins.name: orq-mcp
plugins.description: Orq MCP server for Claude Code. Gives agents access to Orq platform tools.
